title: Gemini visual review S03 panel a1

payload.notes: Gemini auto-gemini-3 VISUAL review of S03_panel_a01.png, mode=baked。researcher 单人身份在像素风格下保持稳定：黑框眼镜+深色短发+黑 T 与 researcher_chibi_canonical_ref 一致，本格无 duo（符合 B03 半拍设定），identity_consistency=5。暖色晨光阶梯教室与窗外冷蓝城市天际线对比统一、贴合 ART_BIBLE 暖世界基调，右下角 home-desk 暖色 inset（ML RESEARCH 马克杯蒸汽渐弱）配色一致，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向清晰（黑板因果图 → 笔记本 'decoding order?' doodle → 桌上手机锁屏卡 → 右下角 inset），composition_readability=5。无肢体崩坏/融合/边缘粒子伪影，artifact_severity=5（满分=无伪影）。本稿为 baked：手机锁屏卡 'ARIS RUNNING' 与琥珀色 DDL 'T-19:42' 小而锐利，黑板/笔记本英文技术字面清晰可读、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["CAUSAL STRUCTURE", "X", "Z", "Y", "invariance", "intervention", "generalization", "decoding order?", "ARIS RUNNING", "DDL", "T-19:42", "ML RESEARCH", "causality"]，与 B03 morning-lecture 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。安全区保留（safezone_present=true）；无游离的 HTML-冲突字形 stray_text_present=false。[transcribed from gemini auto-gemini-3 CLI read, RC=0]
